title: Figure 4 in Intestinal transcriptomes in Kazakh sheep with different haplotypes after experimental Echinococcus granulosus infection
author: Li, Xin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 4. Validation of transcriptome data by qRT-PCR on nine randomly selected genes. Real-time PCR was employed to verify the regulation of genes detected by transcriptome. Nine differential expression genes were randomly selected. GAPDH was used as an internal control.
steps_raw: Figure 4. Validation of transcriptome data by qRT-PCR on nine randomly selected genes. Real-time PCR was employed to verify the regulation of genes detected by transcriptome. Nine differential expression genes were randomly selected. GAPDH was used as an internal control.
